name: Mira
text: There, sister. The bluff broke, and she kept flying through our final illusion anyway.

name: Aisha
text: For once, Mira, your crooked deal revealed the truth. That will have to do.

name: Moon
text: I never claimed it was pure. Only that Selkie deserved the truth.

name: Mira
text: Then stop performing tragedy and tell her plainly. My sister and I already spent our best act.

name: Aisha
text: My sister is right. Caelia guards the last orbit; beyond her, Sunrise is waiting.

name: Moon
text: Selkie, I am coming—not to possess you, but to finally answer you.
